授業の概要・背景: This course will equip students with an understanding of how each of the 4 sections of the IELTS test works. It will give students who have never taken it, or have only taken it once or twice, the confidence to take the test. The course will explore basic strategies for the test but especially focus on the SPEAKING and WRITING sections.

第1回: Students will be given a reading pack, based on the reading section of the IELTS test. They should work on it each week and hand it in on the final day.
第2回:
【Core Week 1】Course Implementation Format："Face-to-face class", Class time - 《90minutes》
Listening Section Overview
Academic Word List practice
Students will be given a reading pack, based on the reading section of the IELTS test. They should work on it each week and hand it in on the final day.
